creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi John,

I think this is not needed as it builds just fine on FreeBSD.  (Sorry,
I do not test these updates on DragonFly as I do not have it around,
although I am happy that apparently DF users can also enjoy our work!)
 The reason is that the conduit package is just a fall-back method for
operating systems where sendfile() is not available.

I guess sendfile() is there on DF as well, so probably you may want to
go with the patch I attached instead.  You may also want to submit
this upstream.
